items.summary: In the backend (backend/main.mo), reduce the IP registration burn fee constant from 100 IPGT to 0.02 IPGT. Given that IPGT uses 2 decimal places of precision (base units), this means the burn amount must be set to 2 base units (i.e., 1/50th of 1 IPGT coin). Update all relevant constants, minimum balance checks, and burn logic accordingly.

Update the IP Registration page (frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx) and the RegistrationSuccessModal (frontend/src/components/RegistrationSuccessModal.tsx) to display the correct burn fee of 0.02 IPGT instead of 100 IPGT. Any UI text, tooltips, or helper copy referencing the burn amount must reflect the new fee.

Ensure the Internet Identity authentication hook (frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts) persists the authenticated session across page reloads using AuthClient's local storage persistence. On app startup, the app must automatically restore an existing authenticated session without requiring the user to log in again. The session should remain valid until the user explicitly logs out or the session naturally expires.
